MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff N.R. Patel is present.
Attorney Arnold Evje appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Judith Gerry is present.
Attorney Marilyn Underwood representing the defendant through limited scope.

Judge Quuidachay, litigants and counsel confer privately in chambers, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of NOV-14-2011 is vacated.
